languages.text: {n}Себериан перехватывает оружие поудобнее.{/n} "Громкие слова. Давайте проверим, стоит ли наша династия гордых речей".
{n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан перехватывает оружие поудобнее.{/n} "Громкие слова. Давайте проверим, стоит ли наша династия гордых речей".

{n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

languages.text: {n}Seberian cierra los dedos en torno a su arma.{/n} «Unas palabras muy atrevidas. Veamos su si nuestra dinastía está a la altura de su fanfarronada».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian cierra los dedos en torno a su arma.{/n} «Unas palabras muy atrevidas. Veamos su si nuestra dinastía está a la altura de su fanfarronada».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安在武器上活动了一下手指。{/n}“口气真大。那就看看我们的王朝能不能配得上你这番自夸吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安在武器上活动了一下手指。{/n}“口气真大。那就看看我们的王朝能不能配得上你这番自夸吧。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian ressert sa main sur la poignée de son arme.{/n} « Vous ne manquez pas d'audace. Voyons si notre dynastie saura se montrer à la hauteur de votre bravade. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian ressert sa main sur la poignée de son arme.{/n} « Vous ne manquez pas d'audace. Voyons si notre dynastie saura se montrer à la hauteur de votre bravade. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, silahının üzerinde parmaklarını esnetiyor.{/n} "Cesur sözler. Bakalım hanedanlığımız bu böbürlenmelerine yaraşır bir geleceğe sahip olacak mı?"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, silahının üzerinde parmaklarını esnetiyor.{/n} "Cesur sözler. Bakalım hanedanlığımız bu böbürlenmelerine yaraşır bir geleceğe sahip olacak mı?"

languages.text: {n}Seberian spielt mit den Fingern auf seiner Waffe.{/n} "Große Worte. Mal sehen, ob deine Dynastie deiner Prahlerei gerecht werden kann."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian spielt mit den Fingern auf seiner Waffe.{/n} "Große Worte. Mal sehen, ob deine Dynastie deiner Prahlerei gerecht werden kann."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは武器を握り、指を曲げ伸ばしする。{/n}「お前の言葉は大胆だ。我らの王朝が、お前の大言壮語に耐えられるか試してみよう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは武器を握り、指を曲げ伸ばしする。{/n}「お前の言葉は大胆だ。我らの王朝が、お前の大言壮語に耐えられるか試してみよう。」
